spec.reasoning: The task references sheet names 'BZTB' and 'Tema UV COS' which are surface anchors that can be renamed without changing logic. I renamed 'BZTB' to 'BZTB_Data', 'Manual Extraction' to 'Manual Extract', and 'Tema UV COS' to 'Tema UV COS Output' - all maintaining similar descriptiveness levels. I did not rename any columns because the headers in this spreadsheet are actually data values (like '398725', 'Sale Retail 28 CX 3 New') rather than traditional column headers, and the instruction references columns by letter (A, B, C, D) not by name. I added 3 blank rows after the last row in BZTB_Data to test if agents hardcode the row range (141 rows). I also added a distractor column 'Notes' after column D to test if agents correctly limit extraction to columns A-D. The instruction must be updated to reference the new sheet names.
